$comment: Termless backend manifest. Upstream uses URI format: npm:<pkg>, crate:<name>, github:<org/repo>

xtermjs.label: xterm.js
xtermjs.description: The most widely used web terminal emulator. Powers VS Code's terminal.
xtermjs.caveat: Headless mode doesn't expose cursor visibility or underline variants

ghostty.label: Ghostty (WASM)
ghostty.description: Mitchell Hashimoto's GPU-accelerated terminal via WASM.

vt100.label: vt100
vt100.description: Pure TypeScript VT100 emulator. Zero dependencies, fastest backend.

alacritty.label: Alacritty
alacritty.description: Rust-based GPU-accelerated terminal. Strong reflow behavior.

wezterm.label: WezTerm
wezterm.description: Broadest protocol support: sixel graphics, semantic prompts, Kitty keyboard.

peekaboo.label: Peekaboo
peekaboo.description: Tests against a real terminal app via OS accessibility APIs. macOS only.

vt100-rust.label: vt100-rust
vt100-rust.caveat: Doesn't expose scrollback beyond screen height

libvterm.label: libvterm
libvterm.description: Neovim's C VT parser compiled to WASM.

ghostty-native.label: Ghostty
ghostty-native.description: Native Ghostty via Zig N-API bindings. Full API access, no WASM overhead.

kitty.label: Kitty
kitty.description: Kitty's VT parser via Python subprocess bridge. Only backend with Kitty graphics.
